task: On https://books.toscrape.com, open the Mystery category and count exactly how many books in that category cost less than 20 pounds. Check every page of the category. Report the exact count.

attempts.claimed_answer:
In the Mystery category on https://books.toscrape.com, there are exactly **10 books** that cost less than £20.

**Page 1 (books 1-20) - 7 books under £20:**
1. In a Dark, Dark Wood - £19.63
2. A Murder in Time - £16.64
3. That Darkness - £13.92
4. Tastes Like Fear - £10.69
5. A Study in Scarlet - £16.73
6. Hide Away (Eve Duncan) - £11.84
7. Playing with Fire - £13.71

**Page 2 (books 21-32) - 3 books under £20:**
8. The Cuckoo's Calling (Cormoran Strike) - £19.21
9. The Girl You Lost - £12.29
10. The Girl In The Ice - £15.85

**Total: 32 mystery books, 10 under £20**
